title: CGC Stock Earnings: Q1 2025 Results - Missed Expectations on Both Fronts
text: Canopy Growth reported Q1 2025 earnings on August 9, 2024, missing analyst projections on both key metrics. Earnings Per Share: The company posted a loss of $1.19 per share, significantly underperforming the analyst estimate of -35 cents per share. Revenue Performance: Revenue came in at $48.40 million, representing 10.11% worse than the analyst estimate for revenue of $53.84 million. Both earnings and top-line results disappointed investors. The company's EPS miss was particularly notable exceeding expectations for losses by more than triple while revenue fell short by approximately $5.4 million compared to what analysts had anticipated.
